answer:
Clay offers a free tier, but it does not include developer-focused HTTP API access. HTTP API functionality is restricted to the Growth plan, which starts at $495 per month [1][2].

The free tier is self-serve and provides 100 data credits and 500 actions per month for testing and low-volume workflows, with a limit of 200 rows per table [2]. While you can perform basic enrichment and use Clay’s AI agents, you must upgrade to the Growth tier or higher to access CRM integrations and HTTP API capabilities [1][2].
